title: Water Engineer & Hydrologist
subtitle: MSc Water Engineering & Management · Asian Institute of Technology, Thailand
bio: Graduate student at AIT Thailand with 5+ years of research in hydrology, GIS, citizen science, and AI/ML — solving real water challenges across South and Southeast Asia.
shortBio: Make your life meaningful and work hard to achieve what you want in your life.

highlights.biography: I'm a Water Engineering and Management graduate student at the Asian Institute of Technology (AIT), Thailand (GPA: 3.87/4.0), with a deep focus on hydrology, climate change, and sustainable water resource management.
highlights.expertise: My research integrates hydrological modelling, remote sensing, GIS, and AI/ML to solve real-world water challenges.
